name: Contract Transition Incentive Playbook
trigger_condition: Month-to-month contract type combined with tenure under 18 months.
description: Transition the customer from a flexible Month-to-Month billing plan to a stable 1-Year or 2-Year contract by offering a pricing guarantee and bundled perks.
action_steps: Contact customer via executive outreach program offering the 'Loyalty Price Shield'.
Offer a 15% discount on their current monthly charge if they sign a 12-month contract.
Waive any upcoming upgrade or activation fees for new features.
Bundle 3 months of premium Tech Support or Online Backup free of charge.
roi_impact: Expected to decrease customer churn probability by 40-55% and secure monthly recurring revenue (MRR) for at least 12 months.

name: High Monthly Charges Adjustment Strategy
trigger_condition: Monthly charges exceed $75 and customer has expressed price concerns or has high probability of churn.
description: Audit the customer's active services to remove unused features and bundle essential services under a discounted loyalty rate.
action_steps: Review customer's package usage. Identify streaming plans or extra lines that have low or zero utilization.
Propose the 'Value Pack Bundle' which consolidates their phone and internet services, dropping monthly bill by $15-$20 without removing core utilities.
Apply a credit of $50 to their next billing cycle as a good-will gesture.
Recommend switching from Electronic Check to Auto-pay (Credit Card/Bank Transfer) for an additional automatic $5 monthly credit.
roi_impact: Decreases immediate churn risk, builds goodwill, and converts manual payment customers to frictionless auto-pay.

name: Fiber-Optic Support & Reliability Protocol
trigger_condition: Fiber-optic internet type combined with lack of Tech Support subscription.
description: Fiber-optic networks have higher speeds but customers experience higher churn rates when they encounter setup/connection issues without standard tech support. This protocol automatically provisions premium support.
action_steps: Flag account for a proactive technical health check of their local router/connection status.
Offer the 'Tech assurance bundle': free upgrade to premium Tech Support for 6 months (normally $8.00/month).
Send a complimentary router self-check guide and schedule a callback from a senior technician to ensure line stability.
Provide a priority support routing code so the customer bypasses standard queues if they call in the future.
roi_impact: Reduces connection-based frustration which is the primary cause of churn among fiber-optic subscribers.

name: Digital Security & Safety Add-on Bundle
trigger_condition: Customer has internet service but is missing OnlineSecurity, OnlineBackup, or DeviceProtection services.
description: Customers who subscribe to security and protection features churn at a significantly lower rate (sticky products). Introduce these products as value-adds rather than upsells.
action_steps: Educate customer on cyber threats and data loss risks, highlighting that their plan qualifies for discounted protection.
Offer the 'Peace of Mind' security suite (Online Security + Online Backup) free for the first 90 days, auto-renewing at a 50% discount ($4/month instead of $8).
Assist the customer in setting up their backup service during the call to increase activation rates.
Emphasize the digital identity protection features included in the package.
roi_impact: Increases product stickiness, customer lifetime value, and adds low-marginal-cost value features.

name: Auto-Pay and Paperless Transition Playbook
trigger_condition: Customer pays via Electronic Check or Mailed Check and uses paper billing.
description: Electronic check and mailed check payments require manual monthly action from the customer, causing recurring price awareness and payment friction. Auto-pay and paperless billing create frictionless retention.
action_steps: Send an email and SMS campaign detailing the 'Paperless Savings' incentive.
Offer a one-time billing credit of $25 if they enroll in both Bank Auto-pay and Paperless Billing.
Guide customer through setting up a preferred credit card or bank routing number via the self-service dashboard.
Highlight the environment-friendly aspect of paperless statement delivery.
roi_impact: Reduces monthly invoice processing costs and eliminates recurring monthly payment friction, reducing transactional churn.
